age_bucket.age_21_or_younger: Age on Sept. 1 is less than 22.0 when present.
age_bucket.age_22_to_24: Age on Sept. 1 is at least 22.0 and less than 25.0 when present.
age_bucket.age_25_to_27: Age on Sept. 1 is at least 25.0 and less than 28.0 when present.
age_bucket.age_28_plus: Age on Sept. 1 is at least 28.0 when present.
age_bucket.age_unknown: Age is not available in the current processed WR tables, so the row is grouped into an explicit unknown bucket.

career_year_bucket.yr1: First recorded WR feature season for the player.
career_year_bucket.yr2: Second recorded WR feature season for the player.
career_year_bucket.yr3: Third recorded WR feature season for the player.
career_year_bucket.yr4_plus: Fourth or later recorded WR feature season for the player.

position.WR: All rows are restricted to WRs.

leakage_guardrails.rule: Each feature-season row uses only cohort observations with feature_season strictly less than the current feature_season.
